name: DolEx Dollar Express
description_short: San Jose's Story Road DolEx Dollar Express offers check cashing, bill payment, and money transfer services at 1630 Story Rd.
description_long:
Located at 1630 Story Road in San Jose, CA, this DolEx Dollar Express is a standalone check-cashing store open seven days a week with extended hours. The store maintains hours from 9:00 AM to 7:30 PM most days, with Sunday closing at 5:30 PM and Wednesday closing at 7:00 PM, making it accessible to San Jose residents throughout the week. The location is designed for quick, walk-in service with straightforward access.

This San Jose location provides a complete range of check-cashing services including paycheck cashing, government check cashing, and rapid bill payment options. The store also specializes in money transfer services and financial solutions for customers without traditional bank accounts. For questions about specific services or hours, contact +1 800-481-1946.

When visiting this San Jose address, bring a valid government-issued ID for all transactions. The Story Road location is ideal for residents and workers seeking fast financial services during daytime and extended weekend hours. DolEx's straightforward approach makes it a convenient alternative to traditional banking for the San Jose community.
pros: Extended weekday hours (8:00 AM - 8:00 PM Monday-Friday) accommodate working customers
Weekend availability (9:00 AM - 6:00 PM Saturday-Sunday) provides access when banks are closed
Multiple service offerings including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment in one location
Toll-free phone line (800-481-1946) suggests customer support and possible multi-location network
Established business with web presence and online directions integration
Physical location in high-density San Jose area with accessible address
cons: Website content does not disclose specific fee structures, making cost comparison difficult
No information about check verification or fraud protection processes
Limited online presence and no apparent digital services or remote options
No customer reviews or ratings available from the Waze listing to assess service quality
Unclear whether services are available to non-ID holders or those with banking restrictions
best_for: Unbanked workers who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
International workers needing wire transfers and money order services
Customers in the San Jose area seeking weekend or evening financial services
diagnosis: DolEx Dollar Express is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the San Jose area who need quick check cashing, money transfers, or bill payment outside traditional banking hours. The main caveat is that specific fee structures are not disclosed online, so customers should call (800-481-1946) to compare costs against competitors before using their services regularly.
meta_description: DolEx Dollar Express at 1630 Story Rd, San Jose, CA. Check cashing, bill payment, and money transfer services.
